name: Fennel Foccacia
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 475°F.
2. Divide the dough in half.
3. Spread 1/2 cup olive oil in each of two 10-inch x 15-inch cookie pans (with sides) and sprinkle with cornmeal.
4. Press the dough into the pans, tapping the surface with your fingers for a dimpled top.
5. Drizzle remaining oil over the dough.
6. Combine salt, pepper, and fennel seeds in a small bowl.
7. Sprinkle the mixture over the dough.
8. Bake until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
9. Cut into wedges (22 per cookie sheet). Serve warm or at room temperature.
